examples: Access was via a narrow archway.
Venerable oaks forms a sylvan archway.
For the first thirty miles the red earth road wound its way through the lowland forest, the giant trees standing in solid ranks alongside and their branches entwined in an archway of leaves above us.
Built in 1380, the grade-I listed archway structure was the main entrance for vehicles entering Canterbury.
Through a darkened archway flanked by stern looking security personnel are three 2014 Mercedes-Benz S-Class sedans.
